title: Felicity Knows No Fence.
content:
Of both our fortunes good and bad we find
    Prosperity more searching of the mind:
    Felicity flies o'er the wall and fence,
    While misery keeps in with patience.
meaning:
"Felicity Knows No Fence." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
